title: ulex escayracii
side_effects: Ulex escayracii can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high content of toxic alkaloids. In severe cases, excessive consumption may lead to cardiovascular problems, including high blood pressure and irregular heartbeats. Additionally, improper use of this plant may cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and swelling, in individuals who are sensitive to its compounds. Long-term exposure to the toxic compounds found in Ulex escayracii can also have neurotoxic effects, including dizziness, confusion, and even seizures.
